problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: If Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
